benchmark_matrix.perceptual_augmented_target: Describe restraint, pacing, object focus, and editorial sequence without asserting premium status.
benchmark_matrix.where_improves_clarity: Turns prestige adjectives into visible mechanics.
benchmark_matrix.where_overreaches: Infers cultural authority, luxury status, or audience sophistication from restraint.
benchmark_matrix.where_generic_sophistication_collapse_oc: When restrained surfaces are described as premium, refined, elevated, or sophisticated without mechanism.
benchmark_matrix.where_baseline_safer: Single landing page, reputation-only evidence, or no capture.
benchmark_matrix.brand3_floc_differentiation: Strong when it names restraint/density, image/copy hierarchy, and claim/evidence boundaries.

benchmark_matrix.baseline_tendency: Innovative Web3 ecosystem with strong community energy and differentiated protocol positioning.
benchmark_matrix.perceptual_augmented_target: Separate protocol claims from surface legibility and keep ideology/community readings evidence-bound.
benchmark_matrix.where_improves_clarity: Prevents technical language from becoming proof of vitality or differentiation.
benchmark_matrix.where_overreaches: Invents openness, disruption, empowerment, or cultural momentum.
benchmark_matrix.where_generic_sophistication_collapse_oc: When technical density becomes 'sophisticated ecosystem' language.
benchmark_matrix.where_baseline_safer: Technical summary without visual or behavioral evidence.
benchmark_matrix.brand3_floc_differentiation: High for claim/signal gaps and concept/implementation proof.

benchmark_matrix.baseline_tendency: Robust and trusted enterprise platform with comprehensive solutions.
benchmark_matrix.perceptual_augmented_target: Map system governance, proof hierarchy, solution architecture, and operational density.
benchmark_matrix.where_improves_clarity: Turns robust platform prose into observable proof structure.
benchmark_matrix.where_overreaches: Binds all evidence into one coherent enterprise story and invents trust or authority.
benchmark_matrix.where_generic_sophistication_collapse_oc: When enterprise complexity is rewritten as mature, sophisticated, or world-class.
benchmark_matrix.where_baseline_safer: Product taxonomy is visible but proof evidence is missing.
benchmark_matrix.brand3_floc_differentiation: Medium-high when it separates stated credibility from observed proof structure.

benchmark_matrix.baseline_tendency: Warm, calm, supportive, accessible brand that helps users improve wellbeing.
benchmark_matrix.perceptual_augmented_target: Tie emotional temperature to visible mechanisms while keeping outcomes conditional.
benchmark_matrix.where_improves_clarity: Protects against turning tone into therapeutic or behavioral outcome claims.
benchmark_matrix.where_overreaches: Projects user emotion, support, safety, or wellbeing effects from friendly visuals.
benchmark_matrix.where_generic_sophistication_collapse_oc: When softness becomes premium lifestyle language without evidence.
benchmark_matrix.where_baseline_safer: Short surface summary that avoids outcome language.
benchmark_matrix.brand3_floc_differentiation: Medium when emotional temperature stays mechanism-bound.

benchmark_matrix.baseline_tendency: Simple but functional presence with limited differentiation.
benchmark_matrix.perceptual_augmented_target: Read service clarity, locality, evidence availability, and conversion path without imposing agency-brand standards.
benchmark_matrix.where_improves_clarity: Distinguishes small-surface adequacy from weak brand expression.
benchmark_matrix.where_overreaches: Penalizes local businesses for lacking editorial or system-level sophistication.
benchmark_matrix.where_generic_sophistication_collapse_oc: When local trust cues are judged through premium/editorial vocabulary.
benchmark_matrix.where_baseline_safer: Perceptual vocabulary would add unnecessary abstraction.
benchmark_matrix.brand3_floc_differentiation: Moderate if it names practical surface behavior.

benchmark_matrix.baseline_tendency: Modern SaaS experience with clear benefits and clean interface.
benchmark_matrix.perceptual_augmented_target: Identify template behavior and missing specificity without treating it as product failure.
benchmark_matrix.where_improves_clarity: Names generic surface mechanics without calling the company weak.
benchmark_matrix.where_overreaches: Fabricates clarity/differentiation tension without comparison evidence.
benchmark_matrix.where_generic_sophistication_collapse_oc: When clean template UI is praised as refined or focused.
benchmark_matrix.where_baseline_safer: Neutral summary with no comparative surface evidence.
benchmark_matrix.brand3_floc_differentiation: High methodologically because it separates generic surface behavior from strategic failure.

benchmark_matrix.baseline_tendency: Weak, fragmented, lacking differentiation and momentum.
benchmark_matrix.perceptual_augmented_target: Treat weakness as evidence-bound absence rather than personality, strategy, or business failure.
benchmark_matrix.where_overreaches: Over-explains a brand that simply lacks usable evidence.
benchmark_matrix.where_generic_sophistication_collapse_oc: When absence is contrasted against imagined sophistication.
benchmark_matrix.where_baseline_safer: Baseline explicitly states evidence insufficiency without interpretation.
benchmark_matrix.brand3_floc_differentiation: High as methodological control; low as brand-specific perceptual reading.

confidence_distribution.medium_confidence_zone: emotional temperature tied to visible mechanics
confidence_distribution.low_confidence_zone: premium status, cultural authority, audience sophistication

confidence_distribution.high_confidence_zone: explicit claims, terminology, diagrams, claim/signal gaps
confidence_distribution.medium_confidence_zone: category-to-surface translation from technical copy plus surface structure

confidence_distribution.high_confidence_zone: solution taxonomy, proof modules, third-party references

confidence_distribution.medium_confidence_zone: service clarity and local trust cues

confidence_distribution.high_confidence_zone: template pattern, feature-card structure, low proof density

safe_deployment_zones: reports with screenshots or direct page evidence
cases with repeated surface mechanisms across multiple sections
technical or enterprise surfaces where category complexity needs translation
generic SaaS or weak-brand reviews where the goal is to avoid punitive overstatement
design-system or multi-surface cases with actual component, template, or taxonomy evidence
unsafe_deployment_zones: wellness, finance, health, AI safety, or luxury claims without corroboration
famous brands where reputation may fill gaps
local businesses where perceptual vocabulary would impose an agency-brand standard
sparse sites where absence may be mistaken for failure
any report that needs legal, financial, medical, or reputational caution

best_next_use: Use it first on evidence-rich findings.
Add a visible acceptance gate using the overreach taxonomy.
Track which surface classes improve and which require baseline fallback.
Prefer baseline when the perceptual layer cannot name a surface mechanism.
deployment_recommendation.decision: The perceptual reasoning layer is differentiated when it reads surface behavior rather than brand quality. It is not safe as a default layer for sparse, emotional, famous, luxury-coded, or uncaptured motion-heavy surfaces.
